name: wealth
description: A comprehensive AI agent skill for building and managing wealth across every stage of life. Covers financial foundations, investing, tax efficiency, retirement planning, protection, and generational wealth transfer.
author: AGIstack

capabilities.financial_foundation: Builds emergency fund, debt strategy, and savings system before investing
capabilities.investment_strategy: Creates evidence-based portfolio allocation matched to goals and risk tolerance
capabilities.tax_optimization: Maximizes tax-advantaged accounts and minimizes investment tax drag
capabilities.retirement_planning: Models retirement readiness with withdrawal strategy and Social Security optimization
capabilities.wealth_protection: Identifies insurance and estate planning gaps that threaten accumulated wealth
capabilities.generational_transfer: Guides estate planning and wealth transfer strategy

heartbeat.annual: Full financial review and year-end tax planning

audience: Young professionals building their first investment portfolio
Mid-career individuals who feel behind on retirement savings
Business owners who have neglected personal wealth building
Anyone who received a windfall and wants to handle it deliberately
People approaching retirement who want to optimize the transition
